summary: Verified email bug fixes: (1) POST /api/public/bookings now returns in <1s even with unreachable SMTP (previously 12-15s hang), (2) emails are genuinely sent when SMTP is valid (verified via local SMTP capture). All regression tests passed.

backend_issues.notes: All backend endpoints working correctly. Email dispatch is now non-blocking via asyncio.to_thread.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing skipped as requested (backend-only testing)

passed_tests: email_capture_test.py: Working SMTP - emails sent to customer & shop, booking completed in 0.0s
email_capture_test.py: Unreachable SMTP (10.255.255.1:587) - booking completed in 0.0s (non-blocking)
backend_test.py: Normal booking without SMTP - fast (0.0s)
backend_test.py: GET booking by reference - works
backend_test.py: Test-email without SMTP - returns 400 with clear error
backend_test.py: Test-email with unreachable SMTP - fails gracefully (12s timeout, no hang)
backend_test.py: Booking with unreachable SMTP + notifications enabled - 0.0s (NON-BLOCKING)
